item.title: Tree Found in a Concrete Pour
item.description: A concrete project reveals a tree left in the pour, highlighting the unexpected challenges crews can face on site.

media:content.media:title: Tree Found in a Concrete Pour
media:content.media:description: A concrete project reveals a tree left in the pour, highlighting the unexpected challenges crews can face on site.

item.title: Fridays are my favorite!
item.description: A simple Friday moment from the job site.

media:content.media:title: Fridays are my favorite!
media:content.media:description: A simple Friday moment from the job site.

item.title: Ripping Out Old Concrete and Prepping a Pour
item.description: Old concrete is removed and the site is prepped for a fresh pour, showing a key step in the concrete replacement process.

media:content.media:title: Ripping Out Old Concrete and Prepping a Pour
media:content.media:description: Old concrete is removed and the site is prepped for a fresh pour, showing a key step in the concrete replacement process.

item.title: Driveway Pour with Decorative Stamps
item.description: A driveway pour finished with decorative stamped concrete for a clean, polished look.

media:content.media:title: Driveway Pour with Decorative Stamps
media:content.media:description: A driveway pour finished with decorative stamped concrete for a clean, polished look.

item.title: A Different Take on the Victory Style
item.description: A look at a project that steps outside the usual Victory style, with a focus on the work and the final result.

media:content.media:description: A look at a project that steps outside the usual Victory style, with a focus on the work and the final result.

item.title: How to Work With Concrete
item.description: A simple look at working with concrete and the steps involved in the process.

item.title: A Bold Reveal in Outdoor Construction
item.description: A striking outdoor project reveal from Victory Outdoor Services, highlighting scale, craftsmanship, and the finished result.

item.title: Twist, Push, and Smooth Concrete Finish
item.description: A simple look at the concrete finishing process as the surface is twisted, pushed, and smoothed for a clean result.

media:content.media:title: Twist, Push, and Smooth Concrete Finish
media:content.media:description: A simple look at the concrete finishing process as the surface is twisted, pushed, and smoothed for a clean result.

item.title: Building a Concrete Stairway
item.description: Follow the process of planning and constructing a concrete stairway, from preparation to progress on the job.

media:content.media:description: Follow the process of planning and constructing a concrete stairway, from preparation to progress on the job.

item.title: Removing a Large Driveway on Monday
item.description: A look at the removal of a large driveway at the start of the week, showing the early steps in a concrete project.

media:content.media:title: Removing a Large Driveway on Monday
media:content.media:description: A look at the removal of a large driveway at the start of the week, showing the early steps in a concrete project.

item.title: Concrete Pour Not Setting as Planned
item.description: A look at a concrete pour that isn’t setting as expected, highlighting the importance of timing and conditions on the job site.

media:content.media:title: Concrete Pour Not Setting as Planned
media:content.media:description: A look at a concrete pour that isn’t setting as expected, highlighting the importance of timing and conditions on the job site.

item.title: Pull That Wire, Big Ray Is on the Way
item.description: A quick look at the crew in action as Big Ray heads in to help pull wire on the job site.

media:content.media:title: Pull That Wire, Big Ray Is on the Way
media:content.media:description: A quick look at the crew in action as Big Ray heads in to help pull wire on the job site.
